name: Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and chocolate together over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Mix together the sugar, cocoa powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry mixture to the melted chocolate and butter, stirring continuously until fully combined.
4. Gradually add the cream, stirring until well incorporated.
5. Continue cooking over low heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce reaches a boil.
6. Remove from heat immediately and stir in the vanilla extract until smooth.
Note: Avoid aggressive culinary slang and ensure safety by using "turn off" instead of "kill the heat".
